pattern: Two trees merge by walking both in lockstep: where both have a node, add the values; where only one does, that whole subtree carries over unchanged.
hints: Recurse into both trees at the same position simultaneously.
If one side is missing at a position, the other side's subtree is the answer there with nothing to add.
When both sides have a node, the merged value is their sum and you continue merging the corresponding left and right children.

edge_inputs.description: second tree deeper than the first
first tree empty returns the second
second tree empty returns the first
negatives cancel to zero at the overlap
complementary shapes fill each other in

stress.description: two independent random level-order trees with holes
